  • Module
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractInstruction
    Base implementation of an instruction.
    ClassInstantiationException
    Thrown when a class cannot be instantiated via reflection or other dynamic mechanisms.
    ConditionParseException
    Thrown when a condition expression cannot be parsed or is invalid.
    ConfigInstruction
    Describes a single instruction within a configuration.
    ConfigOperand
    Describes an operand definition within an instruction configuration.
    ConfigurationParseException
    Thrown when a configuration file or object cannot be parsed correctly.
    DefectPipelineException
    Thrown when an instruction pipeline is broken or cannot be executed properly due to internal errors.
    ExecutionSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of an IExecutionContext at a specific point in time.
    ExistingInstructionException
    Thrown when attempting to register an instruction that already exists in the instruction set.
    ICompiledInstruction
    Represents a compiled instruction consisting of an opcode and fixed set of operands.
    ICompiledOperand
    Represents an operand used by compiled instruction.
    ICompiledProgram
    Represents a compiled program as an ordered sequence of compiled instructions.
    ICompiler
    Defines the contract for a compiler that transforms a syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.
    ICondition
    Represents a condition that can be evaluated against an IExecutionContext.
    IConfigEventListener
    Listener for receiving configuration parsing events.
    IConfigParser
    Defines the contract for a configuration parser.
    IExecutionContext
    Represents the runtime state of a Registermaschine during program execution.
    IExecutionContextListener
    Listener interface for observing changes in an IExecutionContext.
    IInstructionSet
    Defines a registry of available instructions.
    ILexer
    Defines the contract for a lexical analyser (lexer) that transforms source text into a sequence of tokens.
    IParser
    Defines the contract for a parser that transforms a sequence of tokens into a ISyntaxTree.
    ISyntaxTree
    Represents a syntax tree produced during the parsing phase.
    ISyntaxTreeNode
    Represents a node within a syntax tree.
    IToken
    Represents a lexical token produced during the lexing phase.
    OperandConcept
    Describes the semantic role of operand within an instruction.
    OperandType
    Defines how the value of an operand is interpreted during execution.
    ParsingEvent<T>
    Represents the result of parsing a configuration element.
    SyntaxErrorException
    Thrown when there is a syntax error in the source code.
    TokenType
    Enumerates the types of lexical tokens recognised by the language.
    UnknownInstructionException
    Thrown when an instruction cannot be identified or is not registered in the current instruction set.
